zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Darrell於1359年出生在英國越可爾瑟賽時，他的父親Sir William Darell47歲，母親Elizabeth45歲。他於1380年與Lady Emma d'Aubigny在英國英格蘭肯特蕾托 哈特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Darrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Airelle in Calvados, France, or Airel in La Manche, Normandy. Compare Dorrell .

variants.name: Dural
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from dural ‘always the same’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Darrell was born in 1359, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir William Darell, was 47 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 45. He married Lady Emma d'Aubigny in 1380, in Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Darrell est né en 1359, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Darell, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Lady Emma d'Aubigny en 1380, à Little Chart, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Darrellが1359年にイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイで生まれた時，父Sir William Darellは47歳，母Elizabethは45歳であった。1380年にイギリスイギリスケントリットル チャートでLady Emma d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Darrell(이)가 1359년 영국 요르크실르 세지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Darell(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리틀 처트에서 Lady Emma d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Darrell nasceu em 1359, em Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Darell, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Emma d'Aubigny em 1380, em Little Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Darrell родился в 1359 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Darell было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Emma d'Aubigny в 1380 г. в местности литл чарт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.
